form.label: Alert History
form.description: Crytica Security alert history analytics dashboard

search.query: index=* sourcetype="crytica:alert" earliest=0 latest=now | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=root_category_id | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=wrapped_category_id | spath path=alert_category_id output=root_flat_category_id | spath path=event.alert_category_id output=wrapped_flat_category_id | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=root_category_name | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=wrapped_category_name | spath path=alert_category_name output=root_flat_category_name | spath path=event.alert_category_name output=wrapped_flat_category_name | spath path=category output=root_category | spath path=event.category output=wrapped_category | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_id\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_category_id>\d+)" | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_name\"\s*:\s*\"(?<raw_alert_category_name>[^\"]+)" | eval alert_category_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_category_id,root_flat_category_id,wrapped_flat_category_id,root_category_id,wrapped_category_id,raw_alert_category_id,"")) | eval alert_category_name=coalesce(alert_category_name,root_flat_category_name,wrapped_flat_category_name,root_category_name,wrapped_category_name,category,root_category,wrapped_category,raw_alert_category_name,"") | where alert_category_id="10" OR alert_category_name="Crytica Threat Alerts" OR alert_category_name="Protected Device Integrity" | spath path=alert_id output=root_alert_id | spath path=event.alert_id output=wrapped_alert_id | spath path=id output=root_id | spath path=event.id output=wrapped_id | spath path=source output=root_source | spath path=dest output=root_dest | spath path=event.dest output=wrapped_dest | spath path=device_name output=root_device_name | spath path=event.device_name output=wrapped_device_name | spath path=severity output=root_severity | spath path=event.severity output=wrapped_severity | spath path=signature output=root_signature | spath path=event.signature output=wrapped_signature | spath path=subject output=root_subject | spath path=event.subject output=wrapped_subject | spath path=description output=root_description | spath path=event.description output=wrapped_description | spath path=alert_event_timestamp output=root_flat_alert_time | spath path=event.alert_event_timestamp output=wrapped_flat_alert_time | rex field=_raw "\"alert_event_timestamp\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_event_timestamp>\d+)" | eval raw_event_time=tonumber(coalesce(alert_event_timestamp,root_flat_alert_time,wrapped_flat_alert_time,raw_alert_event_timestamp,_time)) | eval normalized_event_time=case(isnull(raw_event_time),_time,raw_event_time>9999999999,round(raw_event_time/1000,0),true(),raw_event_time) | eval alert_id=tostring(mvindex(coalesce(alert_id,root_alert_id,wrapped_alert_id,id,root_id,wrapped_id,source,root_source,"Unknown"),0)) | where alert_id!="Unknown" AND alert_id!="" | join type=left alert_id [ | inputlookup crytica_alert_state_lookup | eval alert_id=coalesce(alert_id,_key) | rename state AS workflow_state | fields alert_id workflow_state ] | eval workflow_state=mvindex(coalesce(workflow_state,"open"),0) | where workflow_state!="resolved" | eval device=mvindex(coalesce(dest,root_dest,wrapped_dest,device_name,root_device_name,wrapped_device_name,host,"Unknown"),0) | eval severity=lower(mvindex(coalesce(severity,root_severity,wrapped_severity,"unknown"),0)) | eval subject=mvindex(coalesce(subject,root_subject,wrapped_subject,description,root_description,wrapped_description,"Unknown"),0) | eval element_change=mvindex(coalesce(signature,root_signature,wrapped_signature,"Other/Unclassified"),0) | stats latest(normalized_event_time) AS normalized_event_time latest(device) AS device latest(severity) AS severity latest(element_change) AS element_change latest(subject) AS subject latest(workflow_state) AS workflow_state BY alert_id | sort 0 normalized_event_time | eval is_new_threat=if(workflow_state="open",1,0) | eval new_device=if(is_new_threat=1,device,null()) | eval new_severity=if(is_new_threat=1,severity,null()) | eval new_element_change=if(is_new_threat=1,element_change,null()) | eval new_subject=if(is_new_threat=1,subject,null()) | stats count AS threat_alerts sum(is_new_threat) AS new_threat_alerts latest(new_device) AS threat_device latest(new_severity) AS threat_severity latest(new_element_change) AS threat_element_change latest(new_subject) AS threat_subject | eval threat_alerts=coalesce(threat_alerts,0), new_threat_alerts=coalesce(new_threat_alerts,0), threat_device=coalesce(threat_device,"--"), threat_severity=coalesce(threat_severity,"--"), threat_element_change=coalesce(threat_element_change,"--"), threat_subject=coalesce(threat_subject,"--")

index=* sourcetype="crytica:alert" earliest=0 latest=now | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=root_category_id | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=wrapped_category_id | spath path=alert_category_id output=root_flat_category_id | spath path=event.alert_category_id output=wrapped_flat_category_id | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=root_category_name | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=wrapped_category_name | spath path=alert_category_name output=root_flat_category_name | spath path=event.alert_category_name output=wrapped_flat_category_name | spath path=category output=root_category | spath path=event.category output=wrapped_category | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_id\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_category_id>\d+)" | rex field=_raw "\"alert_category_name\"\s*:\s*\"(?<raw_alert_category_name>[^\"]+)" | eval alert_category_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_category_id,root_flat_category_id,wrapped_flat_category_id,root_category_id,wrapped_category_id,raw_alert_category_id,"")) | eval alert_category_name=coalesce(alert_category_name,root_flat_category_name,wrapped_flat_category_name,root_category_name,wrapped_category_name,category,root_category,wrapped_category,raw_alert_category_name,"") | where alert_category_id="20" OR alert_category_name="Crytica Performance Alerts" OR alert_category_name="Protected Device Performance" | spath path=alert_id output=root_alert_id | spath path=event.alert_id output=wrapped_alert_id | spath path=id output=root_id | spath path=event.id output=wrapped_id | spath path=source output=root_source | spath path=dest output=root_dest | spath path=event.dest output=wrapped_dest | spath path=device_name output=root_device_name | spath path=event.device_name output=wrapped_device_name | spath path=severity output=root_severity | spath path=event.severity output=wrapped_severity | spath path=signature output=root_signature | spath path=event.signature output=wrapped_signature | spath path=subject output=root_subject | spath path=event.subject output=wrapped_subject | spath path=description output=root_description | spath path=event.description output=wrapped_description | spath path=alert_event_timestamp output=root_flat_alert_time | spath path=event.alert_event_timestamp output=wrapped_flat_alert_time | rex field=_raw "\"alert_event_timestamp\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_event_timestamp>\d+)" | eval raw_event_time=tonumber(coalesce(alert_event_timestamp,root_flat_alert_time,wrapped_flat_alert_time,raw_alert_event_timestamp,_time)) | eval normalized_event_time=case(isnull(raw_event_time),_time,raw_event_time>9999999999,round(raw_event_time/1000,0),true(),raw_event_time) | eval alert_id=tostring(mvindex(coalesce(alert_id,root_alert_id,wrapped_alert_id,id,root_id,wrapped_id,source,root_source,"Unknown"),0)) | where alert_id!="Unknown" AND alert_id!="" | join type=left alert_id [ | inputlookup crytica_alert_state_lookup | eval alert_id=coalesce(alert_id,_key) | rename state AS workflow_state | fields alert_id workflow_state ] | eval workflow_state=mvindex(coalesce(workflow_state,"open"),0) | where workflow_state!="resolved" | eval device=mvindex(coalesce(dest,root_dest,wrapped_dest,device_name,root_device_name,wrapped_device_name,host,"Unknown"),0) | eval severity=lower(mvindex(coalesce(severity,root_severity,wrapped_severity,"unknown"),0)) | eval subject=mvindex(coalesce(subject,root_subject,wrapped_subject,description,root_description,wrapped_description,"Unknown"),0) | eval element_change=mvindex(coalesce(signature,root_signature,wrapped_signature,"Performance Alert"),0) | stats latest(normalized_event_time) AS normalized_event_time latest(device) AS device latest(severity) AS severity latest(element_change) AS element_change latest(subject) AS subject latest(workflow_state) AS workflow_state BY alert_id | sort 0 normalized_event_time | eval is_new_performance=if(workflow_state="open",1,0) | eval new_device=if(is_new_performance=1,device,null()) | eval new_severity=if(is_new_performance=1,severity,null()) | eval new_element_change=if(is_new_performance=1,element_change,null()) | eval new_subject=if(is_new_performance=1,subject,null()) | stats count AS performance_alerts sum(is_new_performance) AS new_performance_alerts latest(new_device) AS performance_device latest(new_severity) AS performance_severity latest(new_element_change) AS performance_element_change latest(new_subject) AS performance_subject | eval performance_alerts=coalesce(performance_alerts,0), new_performance_alerts=coalesce(new_performance_alerts,0), performance_device=coalesce(performance_device,"--"), performance_severity=coalesce(performance_severity,"--"), performance_element_change=coalesce(performance_element_change,"--"), performance_subject=coalesce(performance_subject,"--")

a.aria-label: Open Crytica Security RDAi main dashboard

search.query: index=* sourcetype="crytica:alert" | spath path=dest output=root_dest | spath path=event.dest output=wrapped_dest | spath path=device_name output=root_device_name | spath path=event.device_name output=wrapped_device_name | spath path=severity output=root_severity | spath path=event.severity output=wrapped_severity | spath path=priority output=root_priority | spath path=event.priority output=wrapped_priority | spath path=signature output=root_signature | spath path=event.signature output=wrapped_signature | spath path=subject output=root_subject | spath path=event.subject output=wrapped_subject | spath path=description output=root_description | spath path=event.description output=wrapped_description | spath path=object_path output=root_object_path | spath path=event.object_path output=wrapped_object_path | spath path=file_path output=root_file_path | spath path=event.file_path output=wrapped_file_path | spath path=alert_id output=root_alert_id | spath path=event.alert_id output=wrapped_alert_id | spath path=id output=root_id | spath path=event.id output=wrapped_id | spath path=alert_category_id output=root_flat_category_id | spath path=event.alert_category_id output=wrapped_flat_category_id | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=root_category_id | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_id output=wrapped_category_id | spath path=alert_category_name output=root_flat_category_name | spath path=event.alert_category_name output=wrapped_flat_category_name | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=root_category_name | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_category_name output=wrapped_category_name | spath path=category output=root_category | spath path=event.category output=wrapped_category | spath path=alert_type_name output=root_flat_alert_type_name | spath path=event.alert_type_name output=wrapped_flat_alert_type_name | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_type output=root_alert_type | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_type output=wrapped_alert_type | spath path=crytica_details.alert_core.alert_type_name output=root_alert_type_name | spath path=event.crytica_details.alert_core.alert_type_name output=wrapped_alert_type_name | spath path=crytica_details.device_info.device_os_type_name output=root_os | spath path=event.crytica_details.device_info.device_os_type_name output=wrapped_os | spath path=device_os_type_name output=root_flat_os | spath path=event.device_os_type_name output=wrapped_flat_os | spath path=crytica_details.module_info.module_name output=root_module | spath path=event.crytica_details.module_info.module_name output=wrapped_module | spath path=fields.module_name output=fields_module | spath path=event.fields.module_name output=wrapped_fields_module | spath path=crytica_details.scan_details.scan_scope output=root_scope | spath path=event.crytica_details.scan_details.scan_scope output=wrapped_scope | spath path=fields.scan_scope output=fields_scope | spath path=event.fields.scan_scope output=wrapped_fields_scope | spath path=alert_event_timestamp output=root_flat_alert_time | spath path=event.alert_event_timestamp output=wrapped_flat_alert_time | rex field=_raw "\"alert_event_timestamp\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_event_timestamp>\d+)" | spath path=scan_date output=root_scan_time | spath path=fields.scan_date output=root_fields_scan_time | spath path=event.fields.scan_date output=wrapped_fields_scan_time | rex field=_raw "\"scan_date\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_scan_date>\d+)" | eval raw_event_time=tonumber(coalesce(alert_event_timestamp,root_flat_alert_time,wrapped_flat_alert_time,raw_alert_event_timestamp,scan_date,root_scan_time,root_fields_scan_time,wrapped_fields_scan_time,raw_scan_date,_time)) | eval normalized_event_time=case(isnull(raw_event_time),_time,raw_event_time>9999999999,round(raw_event_time/1000,0),true(),raw_event_time) | eval _time=normalized_event_time | eval device=coalesce(dest,root_dest,wrapped_dest,device_name,root_device_name,wrapped_device_name,host,"Unknown") | eval severity=lower(coalesce(severity,root_severity,wrapped_severity,"unknown")) | eval priority=lower(coalesce(priority,root_priority,wrapped_priority,"unknown")) | eval signature=coalesce(signature,root_signature,wrapped_signature,"Unknown") | eval subject=coalesce(subject,root_subject,wrapped_subject,description,root_description,wrapped_description,"Unknown") | eval object_path=coalesce(object_path,root_object_path,wrapped_object_path,file_path,root_file_path,wrapped_file_path,"Unknown") | eval alert_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_id,root_alert_id,wrapped_alert_id,id,root_id,wrapped_id,source,"Unknown")) | eval alert_category_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_category_id,root_flat_category_id,wrapped_flat_category_id,root_category_id,wrapped_category_id,"")) | eval raw_category_name=coalesce(alert_category_name,root_flat_category_name,wrapped_flat_category_name,root_category_name,wrapped_category_name,category,root_category,wrapped_category,"") | eval category=case(alert_category_id="10","Threat",alert_category_id="20","Performance",raw_category_name="Crytica Threat Alerts","Threat",raw_category_name="Protected Device Integrity","Threat",raw_category_name="Crytica Performance Alerts","Performance",raw_category_name="Protected Device Performance","Performance",raw_category_name!="",raw_category_name,true(),"Unknown") | eval os=coalesce(device_os_type_name,root_flat_os,wrapped_flat_os,root_os,wrapped_os,"Unknown") | eval module=coalesce(module_name,fields_module,wrapped_fields_module,root_module,wrapped_module,"Unknown") | eval scan_scope=coalesce(scan_scope,fields_scope,wrapped_fields_scope,root_scope,wrapped_scope,"Unknown") | eval alert_fingerprint=upper(coalesce(alert_type,root_alert_type,wrapped_alert_type,alert_type_name,root_flat_alert_type_name,wrapped_flat_alert_type_name,root_alert_type_name,wrapped_alert_type_name,signature,subject,"")) | eval element_change=case(match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_PERM|PERMISSION|PERMISSIONS"),"Permissions Modified",match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_OWNER|OWNER|GROUP"),"Owner Or Group Modified",match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_MTIME|MTIME|MODIFICATION TIME"),"Modification Time Changed",match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_CONTENT|CONTENT|HASH|CHECKSUM|SIZE|MODIFIED"),"Content Modified",match(alert_fingerprint,"ELEMENT_DELETED|DELETED|REMOVED|REMOVE"),"Element Deleted",match(alert_fingerprint,"ELEMENT_ADDED|ADDED|CREATE|CREATED|NEW"),"Element Added",true(),"Other/Unclassified") | eval severity_score=case(severity="critical",50,severity="high",40,severity="medium",25,severity="low",10,true(),5) | eval priority_score=case(priority="critical",25,priority="high",20,priority="medium",12,priority="low",6,true(),3) | eval category_score=case(category="Threat",25,category="Performance",15,true(),5) | eval change_score=case(element_change="Element Deleted",25,element_change="Content Modified",22,element_change="Permissions Modified",20,element_change="Owner Or Group Modified",20,element_change="Modification Time Changed",16,element_change="Element Added",12,true(),5) | eval risk=severity_score+priority_score+category_score+change_score | stats count AS total_alerts

Integrity","Threat",raw_category_name="Crytica Performance Alerts","Performance",raw_category_name="Protected Device Performance","Performance",raw_category_name!="",raw_category_name,true(),"Unknown") | eval os=coalesce(device_os_type_name,root_flat_os,wrapped_flat_os,root_os,wrapped_os,"Unknown") | eval Modified",match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_MTIME|MTIME|MODIFICATION TIME"),"Modification Time Changed",match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_CONTENT|CONTENT|HASH|CHECKSUM|SIZE|MODIFIED"),"Content priority_score=case(priority="critical",25,priority="high",20,priority="medium",12,priority="low",6,true(),3) | eval category_score=case(category="Threat",25,category="Performance",15,true(),5) | eval index=* sourcetype="crytica:alert" | spath path=dest output=root_dest | spath path=event.dest output=wrapped_dest | spath path=device_name output=root_device_name | spath path=event.device_name output=wrapped_device_name | spath path=severity output=root_severity | spath path=event.severity output=wrapped_severity | spath path=priority output=root_priority | spath path=event.priority | eval normalized_event_time=case(isnull(raw_event_time),_time,raw_event_time>9999999999,round(raw_event_time/1000,0),true(),raw_event_time) | eval _time=normalized_event_time | eval device=coalesce(dest,root_dest,wrapped_dest,device_name,root_device_name,wrapped_device_name,host,"Unknown") | eval severity=lower(coalesce(severity,root_severity,wrapped_severity,"unknown")) | eval priority=lower(coalesce(priority,root_priority,wrapped_priority,"unknown")) | eval signature=coalesce(signature,root_signature,wrapped_signature,"Unknown") | eval subject=coalesce(subject,root_subject,wrapped_subject,description,root_description,wrapped_description,"Unknown") | eval object_path=coalesce(object_path,root_object_path,wrapped_object_path,file_path,root_file_path,wrapped_file_path,"Unknown") | eval alert_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_id,root_alert_id,wrapped_alert_id,id,root_id,wrapped_id,source,"Unknown")) | eval alert_category_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_category_id,root_flat_category_id,wrapped_flat_category_id,root_category_id,wrapped_category_id,"")) | eval raw_category_name=coalesce(alert_category_name,root_flat_category_name,wrapped_flat_category_name,root_category_name,wrapped_category_name,category,root_category,wrapped_category,"") | eval category=case(alert_category_id="10","Threat",alert_category_id="20","Performance",raw_category_name="Crytica Threat Alerts","Threat",raw_category_name="Protected Device Integrity","Threat",raw_category_name="Crytica Performance Alerts","Performance",raw_category_name="Protected Device Performance","Performance",raw_category_name!="",raw_category_name,true(),"Unknown") | eval os=coalesce(device_os_type_name,root_flat_os,wrapped_flat_os,root_os,wrapped_os,"Unknown") | eval module=coalesce(module_name,fields_module,wrapped_fields_module,root_module,wrapped_module,"Unknown") | eval scan_scope=coalesce(scan_scope,fields_scope,wrapped_fields_scope,root_scope,wrapped_scope,"Unknown") | eval alert_fingerprint=upper(coalesce(alert_type,root_alert_type,wrapped_alert_type,alert_type_name,root_flat_alert_type_name,wrapped_flat_alert_type_name,root_alert_type_name,wrapped_alert_type_name,signature,subject,"")) | eval element_change=case(match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_PERM|PERMISSION|PERMISSIONS"),"Permissions Modified",match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_OWNER|OWNER|GROUP"),"Owner Or Group Modified",match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_MTIME|MTIME|MODIFICATION TIME"),"Modification Time Changed",match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_CONTENT|CONTENT|HASH|CHECKSUM|SIZE|MODIFIED"),"Content Modified",match(alert_fingerprint,"ELEMENT_DELETED|DELETED|REMOVED|REMOVE"),"Element Deleted",match(alert_fingerprint,"ELEMENT_ADDED|ADDED|CREATE|CREATED|NEW"),"Element Added",true(),"Other/Unclassified") | eval severity_score=case(severity="critical",50,severity="high",40,severity="medium",25,severity="low",10,true(),5) | eval priority_score=case(priority="critical",25,priority="high",20,priority="medium",12,priority="low",6,true(),3) | eval category_score=case(category="Threat",25,category="Performance",15,true(),5) | eval change_score=case(element_change="Element Deleted",25,element_change="Content Modified",22,element_change="Permissions Modified",20,element_change="Owner Or Group Modified",20,element_change="Modification Time Changed",16,element_change="Element Added",12,true(),5) | eval risk=severity_score+priority_score+category_score+change_score | where category="Performance" | stats count AS performance_alerts

raw_event_time=tonumber(coalesce(alert_event_timestamp,root_flat_alert_time,wrapped_flat_alert_time,raw_alert_event_timestamp,scan_date,root_scan_time,root_fields_scan_time,wrapped_fields_scan_time,raw_scan_date,_time)) | eval normalized_event_time=case(isnull(raw_event_time),_time,raw_event_time>9999999999,round(raw_event_time/1000,0),true(),raw_event_time) | eval _time=normalized_event_time | eval device=coalesce(dest,root_dest,wrapped_dest,device_name,root_device_name,wrapped_device_name,host,"Unknown") | eval severity=lower(coalesce(severity,root_severity,wrapped_severity,"unknown")) | eval priority=lower(coalesce(priority,root_priority,wrapped_priority,"unknown")) | eval signature=coalesce(signature,root_signature,wrapped_signature,"Unknown") | eval subject=coalesce(subject,root_subject,wrapped_subject,description,root_description,wrapped_description,"Unknown") | eval object_path=coalesce(object_path,root_object_path,wrapped_object_path,file_path,root_file_path,wrapped_file_path,"Unknown") | eval alert_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_id,root_alert_id,wrapped_alert_id,id,root_id,wrapped_id,source,"Unknown")) | eval alert_category_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_category_id,root_flat_category_id,wrapped_flat_category_id,root_category_id,wrapped_category_id,"")) | eval raw_category_name=coalesce(alert_category_name,root_flat_category_name,wrapped_flat_category_name,root_category_name,wrapped_category_name,category,root_category,wrapped_category,"") | eval category=case(alert_category_id="10","Threat",alert_category_id="20","Performance",raw_category_name="Crytica Threat Alerts","Threat",raw_category_name="Protected Device Integrity","Threat",raw_category_name="Crytica Performance Alerts","Performance",raw_category_name="Protected Device Performance","Performance",raw_category_name!="",raw_category_name,true(),"Unknown") | eval os=coalesce(device_os_type_name,root_flat_os,wrapped_flat_os,root_os,wrapped_os,"Unknown") | eval module=coalesce(module_name,fields_module,wrapped_fields_module,root_module,wrapped_module,"Unknown") | eval scan_scope=coalesce(scan_scope,fields_scope,wrapped_fields_scope,root_scope,wrapped_scope,"Unknown") | eval alert_fingerprint=upper(coalesce(alert_type,root_alert_type,wrapped_alert_type,alert_type_name,root_flat_alert_type_name,wrapped_flat_alert_type_name,root_alert_type_name,wrapped_alert_type_name,signature,subject,"")) | eval element_change=case(match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_PERM|PERMISSION|PERMISSIONS"),"Permissions Modified",match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_OWNER|OWNER|GROUP"),"Owner Or Group Modified",match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_MTIME|MTIME|MODIFICATION TIME"),"Modification Time Changed",match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_CONTENT|CONTENT|HASH|CHECKSUM|SIZE|MODIFIED"),"Content Modified",match(alert_fingerprint,"ELEMENT_DELETED|DELETED|REMOVED|REMOVE"),"Element Deleted",match(alert_fingerprint,"ELEMENT_ADDED|ADDED|CREATE|CREATED|NEW"),"Element Added",true(),"Other/Unclassified") | eval severity_score=case(severity="critical",50,severity="high",40,severity="medium",25,severity="low",10,true(),5) | eval priority_score=case(priority="critical",25,priority="high",20,priority="medium",12,priority="low",6,true(),3) | eval category_score=case(category="Threat",25,category="Performance",15,true(),5) | eval change_score=case(element_change="Element Deleted",25,element_change="Content Modified",22,element_change="Permissions Modified",20,element_change="Owner Or Group Modified",20,element_change="Modification Time Changed",16,element_change="Element Added",12,true(),5) | eval risk=severity_score+priority_score+category_score+change_score | where normalized_event_time>=relative_time(now(),"$history_earliest$") AND normalized_event_time<=now() | timechart span=$history_span$ count BY category

rex field=_raw "\"alert_event_timestamp\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_alert_event_timestamp>\d+)" | spath path=scan_date output=root_scan_time | spath path=fields.scan_date output=root_fields_scan_time | spath path=event.fields.scan_date output=wrapped_fields_scan_time | rex field=_raw "\"scan_date\"\s*:\s*\"?(?<raw_scan_date>\d+)" | eval raw_event_time=tonumber(coalesce(alert_event_timestamp,root_flat_alert_time,wrapped_flat_alert_time,raw_alert_event_timestamp,scan_date,root_scan_time,root_fields_scan_time,wrapped_fields_scan_time,raw_scan_date,_time)) | eval normalized_event_time=case(isnull(raw_event_time),_time,raw_event_time>9999999999,round(raw_event_time/1000,0),true(),raw_event_time) | eval _time=normalized_event_time | eval device=coalesce(dest,root_dest,wrapped_dest,device_name,root_device_name,wrapped_device_name,host,"Unknown") | eval severity=lower(coalesce(severity,root_severity,wrapped_severity,"unknown")) | eval priority=lower(coalesce(priority,root_priority,wrapped_priority,"unknown")) | eval signature=coalesce(signature,root_signature,wrapped_signature,"Unknown") | eval subject=coalesce(subject,root_subject,wrapped_subject,description,root_description,wrapped_description,"Unknown") | eval object_path=coalesce(object_path,root_object_path,wrapped_object_path,file_path,root_file_path,wrapped_file_path,"Unknown") | eval alert_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_id,root_alert_id,wrapped_alert_id,id,root_id,wrapped_id,source,"Unknown")) | eval alert_category_id=tostring(coalesce(alert_category_id,root_flat_category_id,wrapped_flat_category_id,root_category_id,wrapped_category_id,"")) | eval raw_category_name=coalesce(alert_category_name,root_flat_category_name,wrapped_flat_category_name,root_category_name,wrapped_category_name,category,root_category,wrapped_category,"") | eval category=case(alert_category_id="10","Threat",alert_category_id="20","Performance",raw_category_name="Crytica Threat Alerts","Threat",raw_category_name="Protected Device Integrity","Threat",raw_category_name="Crytica Performance Alerts","Performance",raw_category_name="Protected Device Performance","Performance",raw_category_name!="",raw_category_name,true(),"Unknown") | eval os=coalesce(device_os_type_name,root_flat_os,wrapped_flat_os,root_os,wrapped_os,"Unknown") | eval module=coalesce(module_name,fields_module,wrapped_fields_module,root_module,wrapped_module,"Unknown") | eval scan_scope=coalesce(scan_scope,fields_scope,wrapped_fields_scope,root_scope,wrapped_scope,"Unknown") | eval alert_fingerprint=upper(coalesce(alert_type,root_alert_type,wrapped_alert_type,alert_type_name,root_flat_alert_type_name,wrapped_flat_alert_type_name,root_alert_type_name,wrapped_alert_type_name,signature,subject,"")) | eval element_change=case(match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_PERM|PERMISSION|PERMISSIONS"),"Permissions Modified",match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_OWNER|OWNER|GROUP"),"Owner Or Group Modified",match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_MTIME|MTIME|MODIFICATION TIME"),"Modification Time Changed",match(alert_fingerprint,"MOD_CONTENT|CONTENT|HASH|CHECKSUM|SIZE|MODIFIED"),"Content Modified",match(alert_fingerprint,"ELEMENT_DELETED|DELETED|REMOVED|REMOVE"),"Element Deleted",match(alert_fingerprint,"ELEMENT_ADDED|ADDED|CREATE|CREATED|NEW"),"Element Added",true(),"Other/Unclassified") | eval severity_score=case(severity="critical",50,severity="high",40,severity="medium",25,severity="low",10,true(),5) | eval priority_score=case(priority="critical",25,priority="high",20,priority="medium",12,priority="low",6,true(),3) | eval category_score=case(category="Threat",25,category="Performance",15,true(),5) | eval change_score=case(element_change="Element Deleted",25,element_change="Content Modified",22,element_change="Permissions Modified",20,element_change="Owner Or Group Modified",20,element_change="Modification Time Changed",16,element_change="Element Added",12,true(),5) | eval risk=severity_score+priority_score+category_score+change_score | stats sum(risk) AS Risk count AS Alerts dc(signature) AS "Unique Signatures" values(category) AS Categories values(os) AS OS values(module) AS Modules latest(_time) AS last_seen BY device | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | rename device AS Device last_seen AS "Last Seen" | table Risk Device Alerts "Unique Signatures" Categories OS Modules "Last Seen" | sort 0 - Risk | head 20
